retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the function is a destructor that runs once per entry. Retrying would cause double-free.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free the entire bpf_cpu_map_entry object (stop kthread, release bpf prog via bpf_prog_put, cleanup GRO, clean up ring buffers, free memory). The bpf_prog_put call is one incidental step within broader teardown logic, not the function's main role.
